caption: A man with a shaved head, a dark beard, and a white t-shirt sits in a recording studio against a background of dark grey acoustic foam panels. He wears large black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional silver condenser microphone mounted on a black boom arm. The text "broadcast-Master-800-USB" is visible on the side of the microphone's mounting hardware. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his left hand. He begins by raising his open palm upward and outward. As the sequence progresses, he shifts his hand position, bringing it closer to his face and then moving it quickly downward and across his chest in a sweeping motion, creating a slight motion blur in the final frame. His facial expression remains focused as he continues to talk.
